name_en: M14098 White Color Full Steel Hardware! Chip Version, Phone Pouch Métis! The unique reproduction series Phone Pouch Métis is crafted in colored Monogram coated canvas, injecting vitality into this daily essential. The bag's flap design is specifically for storing smartphones and keys, paired with silver riveted corner guards and S-lock closure, paying tribute to the brand's iconic hard suitcase elements. The bag comes with a detachable chain strap for multiple carrying options.
